name: Primitive
official_rules_text: When a unit attacks, if its Attack Pool has the Primitive keyword and the defending unit has the Armor X keyword, after resolving any instances of the Impact X keyword during the Modify Attack Dice step, the attacking unit must modify all b results to a results.
description: When a unit attacks, if its Attack Pool has the Primitive keyword and the defending unit has the Armor X keyword, after resolving any instances of the Impact X keyword during the Modify Attack Dice step, the attacking unit must modify all b results to a results.
